brief: OpenAI launches agentic tool for autonomous workflows; US strikes Iran as El Niño risks rise; papers explore visualization incentives, AI tutoring, and brain-computer interfaces.
news_summary: OpenAI rebrands Codex for independent workflows; US and Iran exchange strikes after explosions in southern Iran; Volkswagen cuts production as China sales plunge; El Niño risk of persisting through spring 2027 rises.
papers_summary: Research examines performance-based incentives in visualization experiments, AI-powered programming environments for creative computing, and clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China.

en.brief: OpenAI launches agentic tool for autonomous workflows; US strikes Iran as El Niño risks rise; papers explore visualization incentives, AI tutoring, and brain-computer interfaces.
en.news_summary: OpenAI rebrands Codex for independent workflows; US and Iran exchange strikes after explosions in southern Iran; Volkswagen cuts production as China sales plunge; El Niño risk of persisting through spring 2027 rises.
en.papers_summary: Research examines performance-based incentives in visualization experiments, AI-powered programming environments for creative computing, and clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China.

zh.brief: 英國工黨啟動黨魁選舉，貝安德有望接任首相；中國異見者董廣平成功偷渡韓國引關注；廣西洪災預警失靈；澳門國安法首案起訴顛覆罪；德國華人性侵案審判；台灣毒油事件暴露食安漏洞。
zh.news_summary: 英國工黨正式提名新黨魁，貝安德被視為熱門人選；中國異見者董廣平歷經40小時偷渡至韓國獲難民身份；廣西洪災預警體系失效引發質疑；澳門前議員歐錦新被控顛覆罪；德國Telegram群組涉跨國迷姦案；台灣致癌沙拉油流入市面，通報延誤逾50天。
zh.papers_summary: 視覺化與人機互動領域多項研究探討行為激勵、腦機介面臨床轉譯、中國傳統繪畫分析、手語識別手套、AI輔助程式設計環境及數位碎片化等主題。

todays_image.caption: A static model of a fighter jet parallels Qantas's punctuality, both in contrast to the unpredictable nature of Hanson's UK fact-finding.
todays_image.title: Model, Static, Grumman F-14A Tomcat
